a: Google Workspace (Google Chat, Google Docs, Google Sheets, Google Slides, Google Drive)

c.d: The ability to communicate with team members instantly through messaging, chat, voice, and video calls.
Enables users to easily share files, documents, and media with team members, with features for version control and collaborative editing.
Provides tools for creating, assigning, and tracking tasks, setting deadlines, and monitoring progress.
Offers features for planning, organizing, and managing projects, including Gantt charts, Kanban boards, and timeline views.
Compatibility with other popular tools and platforms, such as Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Slack, and other project management or CRM systems.
Ease of use and intuitive interface for all team members, regardless of their technical expertise.
The ability to tailor the app to specific team needs and workflows, including custom fields, views, and automations.
The capacity of the app to accommodate growing teams and increasing project complexity.
Availability of mobile apps for iOS and Android devices, ensuring team members can collaborate on the go.
AI-powered features that automate tasks, provide insights, and improve decision-making
